blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by contract/coverage gap: current repository evidence does not prove a second conflicting timer-start entry point beyond CreateTimeEntry, and prior scrutiny explicitly marks VAL-REG-001 unresolved on that basis.

appliedUpdates.description: Added flow validator guidance sections for browser and backend isolation boundaries used by tracking-regressions validators.

override.reason: VAL-REG-002, VAL-REG-003, and VAL-REG-004 passed. VAL-REG-001 is deferred because the blocker matches the already-accepted scrutiny finding: current mission guidance now records that UpdateTimeEntry preserves stop when Stop=nil, so the requested stopped-to-running second-start path is unsupported under the current contract. The assertion has been moved to follow-up feature `tracking-supported-start-entrypoints-conflict-proof` in an unsealed milestone.

deferredAssertions.reason: Needs explicit enumeration of supported timer-start entry points before further regression work.
